title: fagonia indica var. subinermis
intro: Fagonia indica var. subinermis, also known as Indian thornapple or Gokhru, is a shrub-like plant native to the dry regions of India and Pakistan. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to remove excess fluids from the body, and its antispasmodic properties, which can help to alleviate muscle spasms and cramps. The health benefits of Fagonia indica var. subinermis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and relieve symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Fagonia indica var. subinermis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and Ayurvedic medicine.
